name: GitHub repo-level Actions Secret and Variable RESOURCE edge migration

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: temporary backward-compatibility migration. Earlier versions scoped repo-level GitHubActionsSecret cleanup via HAS_SECRET (per-repo); the schema now uses RESOURCE from GitHubOrganization as the sub_resource. Backfill the RESOURCE edge for every existing repo-scoped secret reachable from the currently-syncing GitHubOrganization via its repositories. Scoped by $org_url so multi-org refreshes don't redo the full graph each time. Idempotent (MERGE). Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (o:GitHubOrganization {id: $org_url})-[:RESOURCE]->(r:GitHubRepository)-[:HAS_SECRET]->(s:GitHubActionsSecret) WHERE s.level = 'repository' MERGE (o)-[rel:RESOURCE]->(s) ON CREATE SET rel.lastupdated = s.lastupdated

statements.__comment__: DEPRECATED: same migration for repo-level GitHubActionsVariable, formerly scoped via HAS_VARIABLE. Scoped by $org_url. Remove in v1.0.0.
statements.query: MATCH (o:GitHubOrganization {id: $org_url})-[:RESOURCE]->(r:GitHubRepository)-[:HAS_VARIABLE]->(v:GitHubActionsVariable) WHERE v.level = 'repository' MERGE (o)-[rel:RESOURCE]->(v) ON CREATE SET rel.lastupdated = v.lastupdated
